/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libraspi.so -o /home/daniel/projects/testing/deltascope_cpp/libs/raspi/libraspi.so CMakeFiles/raspi.dir/src/raspi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raspi.dir/src/raspi_gpio_bcm2835.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raspi.dir/src/raspi_gpio_dwapbssi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raspi.dir/src/raspi_spi_bcm2835.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raspi.dir/src/raspi_spi_dwapbssi.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/daniel/projects/testing/deltascope_cpp/libs/raspi/libs/devicetree /home/daniel/projects/testing/deltascope_cpp/libs/raspi/libs/devicetree/libdevicetree.so
